title: 9 Herbal Creams For Erectile Dysfunction
description: Curcuma longa creams contains a high concentration of curcuminoids, including curcumin, demethoxycurcumin, and bisdemethoxycurcumin. These compounds have potent antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to improve blood flow and reduce oxidative stress in the penile tissue. Curcumin has also been shown to have vasodilatory effects, causing blood vessels to relax and dilate, allowing for increased blood flow to the penis.
